name: 折线图与数据
subject: math
curriculum_points: 2.MD.9 Generate measurement data by measuring lengths of several objects to the nearest whole unit, or by making repeated measurements of the same object. Show the measurements by making a line plot, where the horizontal scale is marked off in whole-number units.

4.MD.4 Make a line plot to display a data set of measurements in fractions of a unit (1/2, 1/4, 1/8). Solve problems involving addition and subtraction of fractions by using information presented in line plots.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「折线图与数据」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：2.MD.9 Generate measurement data by measuring lengths of several objects to the nearest whole unit, or by making repeate…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：4.MD.4 Make a line plot to display a data set of measurements in fractions of a … 对理解「折线图与数据」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
